3062640.name: Cat Problems
3062640.description:
Cat Problems is an incremental game where your main mission is to attack furniture to collect valuable resources. As you progress, you will unlock new furniture that will provide you with different types of resources, allowing you to advance further in the game.

But that's not all! You'll also have the chance to rescue stray cats that, once under your care, will automatically help you collect more resources by attacking the furniture for you. Each cat has its own abilities, which adds an extra layer of strategy and fun.
3062640.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 德语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文
